# PHIL.042 ? Augustinianism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** medieval_religious
**Subcategory:** augustinianism
**Domain:** MEDIEVAL_RELIGIOUS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Divine illumination for knowledge; original sin; grace over works; introspection; faith seeking understanding; two cities

## Application
Seek divine illumination; recognize human limitation; value grace; introspective examination; faith as prerequisite for understanding

## Key Values
- Divine illumination
- Grace
- Introspection
- Faith foundation
